is_professional_llp.description: Boolean indicating professional-LLP status under 13 MRSA Chapter 22-A. Parallel to LP_MLPA-9's entity.is_professional_lllp; the distinction is LLP (general partnership w/ liability shield) vs LLLP (limited partnership w/ liability shield).

professional_partners_licensed_statement.description: Free-text recital confirming all partners are licensed in one or more states to render the LLP's professional services. The form provides a single text widget rather than a boolean — typical filers either enter a confirming statement or leave blank. A future redraft could split this into a boolean entity.professional_partners_all_licensed plus an optional text field for jurisdictions; pass-1 captures it as a single string to match the widget shape.

maine_business_purpose.description: Free-text description of the nature of the business or purposes the foreign entity intends to conduct or promote in Maine. Distinct from entity.business_purpose (LLP_MLLP-2) which is the entity's general home-jurisdiction business activities; this is Maine-specific scope.

maine_activities_start_date.description: Date the foreign entity first did or intends to do business in Maine. Required by 31 MRSA §852.3.J on foreign-qualification filings.

name.description: Name of the contact partner for a foreign LLP filing. The contact partner is an internal LLP role (a partner designated for SOS communications) — distinct from the registered_agent (external agent for service of process) and from filing.contact (cover-letter primitive).

address.description: Business, residence, or mailing address of the contact partner.
